Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 243 

SPLMTL_DSB_OTHR 

LABEL: Beneficiary Other Needs Record in Supplemental Disability File 

DESCRIPTION: A flag to indicate that there is record in the disability and need supplemental file for this person with 
monthly values of: HCBS chronic conditions, care level status for Long-Term Services and Supports 
(LTSS) program, disabilities (concentrating, walking,
